abilities.name: vital-spirit
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be asleep. This causes Rest to fail altogether. If a Pokémon is asleep and acquires this ability, it will immediately wake up; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle. This ability functions identically to Insomnia in battle. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, higher-levelled Pokémon have their encounter rate increased.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon is full of vitality, and that prevents it from falling asleep.

abilities.name: hustle
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5× damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8×.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's physical moves do 1.5× as much regular damage, but have 0.8× their usual accuracy. Special moves are unaffected. Moves that do set damage, such as Seismic Toss, have their accuracy affected, but not their damage. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, higher-levelled Pokémon have their encounter rate increased.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat but lowers its accuracy.

abilities.name: insomnia
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be asleep. This causes Rest to fail altogether. If a Pokémon is asleep and acquires this ability, it will immediately wake up; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle. This ability functions identically to Vital Spirit in battle.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's insomnia prevents it from falling asleep.
